ocr_findings.description: Section bullet markers (●●) for HTTPS and WPA2 headings rendered as '## 09' in OCR instead of the orange double-bullet symbol. Cosmetic; heading text is correct.

reviewer_notes: Page covers HTTPS and WPA2 sections with SSL/TLS diagram (img-0.jpeg) and a two-row WPA2 summary table. All prose accurately captured. The WPA2 table (WPA2とWEPの関係 / WPA2が暗号化する範囲) is correctly rendered in markdown with content intact. SSL/TLS flow diagram is image-only which is acceptable.
